basic_details.job_title: Jadavpur University Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Field Manager, Laboratory Analyst Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jadavpur University Field Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website www.jaduniv.edu.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Jadavpur University Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Field Manager: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC-A/OBC-B, and PWD candidates is as per rule. Laboratory Analyst (Effluent Treatment Plant): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC-A/OBC-B, and PWD candidates is as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Geography/Economics/other social sciences with good overall academic background, minimum 2 yrs research experience in R&D/academia/industry. Desirable: Field experience in rural waste management.
qualification.details: Field Manager: Master's degree in Geography/Economics/other social sciences with good overall academic background, minimum 2 yrs research experience in R&D/academia/industry. Desirable: Field experience in rural waste management. Laboratory Analyst (Effluent Treatment Plant): Master's degree in Environmental Science with good overall academic background, minimum 2 yrs research experience in R&D/academia/industry.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Jadavpur University Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Jadavpur University Recruitment is scheduled for 19th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Field Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Field Manager position, candidates must possess a Master's degree in Geography, Economics, or other social sciences with at least 2 years of research experience. Prior field experience in rural waste management is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in Jadavpur University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by Jadavpur University for the recruitment drive, including positions for Field Manager and Laboratory Analyst.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Jadavpur University Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories of candidates is Rs. 50/-. This fee is payable at the time of obtaining the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Field Manager and Laboratory Analyst posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both the Field Manager and Laboratory Analyst positions is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Field Manager position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Manager post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000/- for a duration of 12 months.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Jadavpur University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to obtain the prescribed application form, fill it, and attend the interview with all required documents on the specified date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required at the time of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original certificates, mark sheets, testimonials, ID proof, and self-attested copies of these documents. Duly filled application form is also required.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC-A/OBC-B, and PWD candidates as per the rules and regulations of Jadavpur University.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the advertised posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview conducted by Jadavpur University.
